ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "e_stop" TEXT /* E-stop functionality (e.g., Not included, Included) */,
  "contacts" TEXT /* Type and number of contacts (e.g., 2 N/C + 1 N/O, 3 N/C) */,
  "wiring_entry" TEXT /* Wiring entry points (e.g., 3 x M20, 3 x 1/2 in. NPT) */,
  "part_no" TEXT /* Part number of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the product */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Manufacturer ID of the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the product was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the product information */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_contacts FOREIGN KEY ("contacts") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_e_stop FOREIGN KEY ("e_stop") REFERENCES e_stops ("e_stop_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_wiring_entry FOREIGN KEY ("wiring_entry") REFERENCES wiring_entries ("wiring_entry_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "e_stops" (
  "e_stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each E-stop type */,
  "e_stop_type" TEXT /* Type of E-stop functionality (e.g., Not included, Included) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the E-stop functionality */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image related to the E-stop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("e_stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact type */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact (e.g., N/C, N/O) */,
  "contact_quantity" INTEGER /* Number of contacts */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the contact type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image related to the contact type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wiring_entries" (
  "wiring_entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wiring entry type */,
  "wiring_entry_type" TEXT /* Type of wiring entry (e.g., M20, 1/2 in. NPT) */,
  "wiring_entry_quantity" INTEGER /* Number of wiring entries */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the wiring entry type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image related to the wiring entry type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wiring_entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_catalogs" (
  "catalog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product catalog */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the catalog belongs to */,
  "specification" TEXT /* Detailed technical specification of the product */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image of the product */,
  "documentation" TEXT /* Documentation for the product (e.g., user manual, datasheet) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the product catalog entry */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Manufacturer ID of the product catalog entry */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the catalog entry was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the catalog entry information */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the catalog entry (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("catalog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_catalogs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_catalogs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_catalogs_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image related to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the manufacturer */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the manufacturer's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)
